name: Fig Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover figs with boiling water, let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Drain and dry on a towel.
3. Clip the stems from the figs and cut into thin strips.
4. Sift white flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar together.
5. Add whole wheat flour to the sifted ingredients and stir to blend.
6. Incorporate the butter into the flour mixture until well combined.
7. Mix in sour milk in which soda has been dissolved.
8. Stir in beaten eggs, chopped walnuts, and figs; beat until smooth.
9. Pour batter into a paper-lined loaf pan (approximately 10 x 5 x 3 inches).
10. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour and 25 minutes.
11. Serve hot with butter or cool and slice thinly for tea sandwiches. Makes excellent toast after one or two days.
